steps.title: Identify the defining trait Daniel displays
steps.content:
The passage opens with a metaphor—“tended the petition like a garden”—that signals devoted, careful attention.

Every detail that follows reinforces this: keeping it with him at all times, his sharpened vigilance for unsigned members, actively cornering people in any location (gas pump, store, café, road, clinic), and securing signatures regardless of circumstance (childbirth, laughter, argument, school pickup).

This is a portrait of relentless, unwavering commitment.

steps.title: Connect the behavioral details to the answer choices
steps.content:
Daniel's actions—tending the petition as though cultivating a garden, keeping it constantly with him, alerting to any unsigned member, pursuing signatures in every setting and circumstance—reveal a person who is deeply, consistently committed to this task.

Two other options discuss member dislike and changing attitudes that the passage never shows; another choice misplaces the focus on community enthusiasm rather than Daniel's driving commitment.

That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
